authority: 04_ENVIRONMENT_AND_STACK.md SS7 (E-R5, researcher-approved 2026-07-03): certified pins are recorded for the reference workstation only, identified by BURHAN_CERTIFIED_WORKSTATION=1; other environments assert values against the same anchors within the stated Monte Carlo tolerance band — never skipped, never bitwise across hosts.
model: golden config (build_golden(11)), n=200, alpha=0.05, PB-01 population (loadings .70 / paths .30 / corr .30)

band.justification: quantum 1/400 = 0.0025; MCSE(p ~= .92, R=400) = sqrt(.92*.08/400) ~= 0.0136; 0.05 ~= 3.7*MCSE — tolerates host-FP re-randomization of marginal replications (observed cross-host movement at R=40 was <= 2*MCSE-equivalent) while systematic divergence lands far outside; E-R5 evidence pack, PR #12.

workstation.environment: reference-workstation: CRAN apt R 4.5.2, source-built renv stack (E-R3)
